integration_evidence.summary: Defines explicit legal Run Record transitions for pending, admitted, running, and terminal statuses, replacing implicit rank progression.
Exports lifecycle transition metadata for runtime and conformance consumers.
Validates explicit transition metadata, skipped-transition rejection, cancellation, and terminal rejection.
Exercises the legal pending-to-admitted-to-running-to-succeeded lifecycle path in conformance self-checks.
Maps GH-102 as the primary Work Item and GH-95 as parent FR evidence without claiming FR completion.

suite_path_consumption.rationale: Narrow Core runtime PR that tightens existing local Run Record lifecycle behavior and self-checks without API routes, generated consumers, database, hosted service, or cross-repo integration.
suite_path_consumption.consumer_boundary: Review and PR Ready consume the runtime transition table, self-check output, conformance output, GH-102 carrier, local build/typecheck/test/lint/conformance output, PR metadata readback, and hosted checks.
suite_path_consumption.recheck_condition: Upgrade to broader suite artifacts when API submit/query behavior, runtime execution, Lode package/capability consumption, Harbor runtime binding, result projection, evidence retrieval, generated types, CLI/MCP/SDK/App-facing API, database storage, hosted service storage, or true-write guardrails are added.
